subject: [PATCH 4/9] sched/deadline: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's deadline scheduler to defer console output of WARN() calls under rq->lock or ->pi_lock. The SCHED_WARN*() variants are used instead, which emit their output asynchronously via irq_work, preventing potential deadlocks caused by synchronous console output while holding these locks.
